disposition: FRACTAL REPEATS (QUALIFIED): street splits into climate-gate x supply-magnitude per locked rules (interaction p=0.001 full sample; clean cell-mean structure), BUT the supply-scaling interaction is carried by the West Coast and goes ns without it. Climate gating robust; supply scaling regional.
QUALIFIER: Interaction is West-Coast-dependent (ns when CA+HI+OR+WA dropped, p=0.19). Climate GATING is robust (cold->~2.7 regardless of supply); supply-MAGNITUDE scaling is regionally concentrated (West Coast). Fractal-repeats holds by the locked full-sample rule but is NOT a robust national law.
